results.title: India-Estonia ties set to drive tech and commerce: Goyal
results.description: India and Estonia are set to deepen their economic and technology partnership, with Commerce and Industry Minister Piyush Goyal highlighting opportunities to combine Estonia’s digital expertise with India’s... results.title: 'We Failed You': Kylian Mbappe Pens Emotional Farewell To Didier Deschamps
results.description: Kylian Mbappe has paid an emotional tribute to Didier Deschamps, admitting France "failed" to give their legendary coach the perfect farewell after World Cup heartbreak.

results.title: New CBSE policy raises concerns over foreign language choices
results.description: CBSE’s three-language policy from Class VI may limit foreign language choices beyond English, prompting concerns from students, parents and educationists in Lucknow.

results.title: Centre suppressing peaceful dissent: Opposition slams removal of Wangchuk from Jantar Mantar
results.description: The removal of climate activist Sonam Wangchuk from his indefinite hunger strike at Jantar Mantar on Saturday sparked a political row with Opposition leaders accusing the Centre of suppressing peaceful democratic protest and failing to engage with him over his demands.Leader of Opposition in the Lok Sabha Rahul Gandhi condemned the move, saying the BJP-led [...]
